id: Quantum Annealing and GNN for Solving TSP with QUBO
title: 量子退火与图神经网络结合求解TSP问题
excerpt: This study highlights the potential of combining deep learning with quantum-inspired optimization for solving NP-hard problems, suggesting future directions for enhancing GNN architectures and applying QUBO frameworks to more complex combinatorial optimization tasks.
